description: You are a Product Safety Specialist at Apex Industrial Chemicals. Author a GHS-compliant Safety Data Sheet (SDS) for 'Apex-Solv 5000' using the formulation, hazard classification, and regulatory text found in /home/ga/Documents/product_data.json. The SDS must contain the 16 standard GHS sections with headers formatted in 'Heading 1' style. Ensure Section 2 includes the exact Hazard Statements (H-codes) and Precautionary Statements, and Section 3 contains a table listing chemical ingredients, CAS numbers, and concentrations. Include a footer with the current revision date and save the document as /home/ga/Documents/SDS_ApexSolv5000.odt.
